rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §28.0258 governs high school graduation via individual graduation committee review. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 28.0258. HIGH SCHOOL DIPLOMA AWARDED ON BASIS OF INDIVIDUAL GRADUATION COMMITTEE REVIEW.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to education graduation committees, not property tax exemptions.
